entries.rationale: Removed: amendment-date chronology and new/additive persistence wording. Preserved: Spec 01 ownership of protocol entities and atomic coordination, and Spec 04 ownership of current persistence, lock-safe bootstrap, liveness/stop, notification outbox and crash recovery. Original audit anchor 350-356 sha256:4eaed778c528e24330667179c71895fca75e72cbe5ec8c95237fc38d3950b163.

Removed: the compatibility-decoder explanation path. Preserved: direct-operation retirement, exclusive typed-intent authority, preview/state/generation/evidence/confirmation binding and every loss/recovery verification oracle through frozen line 988. Boundary expanded to complete paragraphs 974-988 from original audit anchor 974-978 sha256:deb8c9f8091dec146640b80ba2977cbdc6ab09ca20743a9d1483e3cf42bbadae.

Removed: additive-persistence wording, the next-migration ordinal, additive-integration and migration-adds chronology. Preserved: Spec 01 Git semantics ownership; Spec 04 current persistence, sole production Git-effect owner and crash recovery; the no-effect authority boundary; the current Git-grant/custody relation, one journal/state machine, and all eight columns in order. Unchanged frozen 1009-1027 retains the PK, four- and six-column UNIQUE foreign-key parents, composite runs FK, CAS/history/revision/grant-revocation transaction, dependency owner, triggers and immutability. Boundary expanded to 990-1008; R5-03 original audit anchor 990-995 sha256:b0b333ffde75afc2b79579ec4b54ea6d78f817e24ab9935433beed4339c7b7f2; independently reviewed continuation 1004-1008 sha256:375befd9f11585dddda097dda1c08dba41ae055847ba96556b3f50fe00078246 from original audit anchor 997-1002 sha256:9f29e0218e903eccd92cb5afaa17e6f951168ed356f2c331070c84903ca6c6e8.

Removed: the migration actor. Preserved: constraints_json as hash mirror only; normalised closed children for exact operations, remote identity/revision/generation/target digest, qualified refs and path prefixes; the closed operation enum, gate-only rejection, composite remote foreign keys and empty-set-means-unavailable rule. Original audit anchor 1096-1102 sha256:877fb24e856803dc7a9afd65bc8a6eaba65604ade6804176bbf171491afc5ecb.

Removed: migration-time widening. Preserved: the exact closed state additions, canonical-owner/no-parallel-journal invariant, exact Git binding/admission/reservation join, closed row-combination table and one-transaction update of every named row. Original audit anchor 1394-1401 sha256:a889edcfb076ca80b658e9de99959327f3d73cb9ff7e7db382967d89b1e97889.

Removed: incremental migration preflight over historical state. Preserved: every malformed/path/value/digest rejection, authority history/profile/remote/constraint/revision/provenance/scope check, complete typed binding, lower-valid-revision rule, exact gate and four-owner/reservation/resolution/lock checks, zero inference and no-mutation preservation. Original audit anchor 1835-1848 sha256:1fcb2b023e810997846d90c79ca9d28ad306da031aeee6491a18078dd77e97ff.

Removed: schema-version chronology and forward-repair wording. Preserved: atomic fresh-baseline installation of every named key, index and trigger; the sole operation-ID join trigger; all immutability/state/digest/containment/live-authority/same-run/global-revision triggers; and section 7 recovery safety. Original audit anchor 1850-1858 sha256:39f2b6f2abd47c012315145797ecb54d9c85801b5d859e0928be15cf2f0c8d2e.

Removed: the direct migration-preflight/rollback oracle. Preserved: deterministic coverage of every composite FK, immutable draft/binding/resolution, grant revision and exclusivity invariants, all four-owner combinations, one active reservation and indexed current queries. This replacement is lockstep with F023-13 and F023-14. Original audit anchor 1860-1866 sha256:0be24405ce90781b2a7e6c89d6275a5395ef2b96026869324666720097d29bf3.

Removed: Migration 0010 and additive chronology. Preserved: every registry column, immutability rule, partial uniqueness, disjoint CHECK shape, producer namespace, active projection and exact UNIQUE/foreign-key-parent obligation through line 2079. Boundary expanded to 2063-2079 from original audit anchor 2063-2072 sha256:b0035e4261dbbd9ec004b93a1b19b9c197851813d54ba35c13eb7cccdf97c915.

Removed: compatibility backfill language in which existing/new bindings gain registry IDs. Preserved: invalid path and digest collision quarantine without codec crash or guessed provenance, exact registry IDs on every receipt/intake binding, and exact same-scope active-row foreign-key/trigger equality. Original audit anchor 2089-2093 sha256:81652e0774d3728ca7318f6873df02021a4f24139cd97755d635aec042d67984.

Removed: schema fields/states gain and new-revision chronology. Preserved: accepted-scope registry ID and closed state, exact acceptedScopeRef cardinality/state rule, zero/multiple/quarantined rejection, no first-ref selection and same-transaction project revision advance. Original audit anchor 2095-2100 sha256:168651ca70d5a0a6b32b749679fbfc94fde72f4702d8ba77cb34411de81a1975.

Removed: table-replacement, migration-record and old/new schema procedure. Preserved: staged rows/bindings, FK/integrity, identity/count, canonical path/digest and trigger probes; failure atomicity at every stage; all-or-nothing unchanged prior state or complete current-schema publication; post-validation capability advertisement; and the Spec 05/04 owner boundary. Original audit anchor 2108-2115 sha256:3467a8e983fa33a389365581d59fb274edd7e84f3f4b02cadddd05869e719461.

Removed: additive persistence change procedure. Preserved: exact project-session/run binding, operationTarget and dependency revision, task/scoped-gate join, run/task/subtree separation, exact run/release scope, identical trigger/service predicate and every targetless, sibling, stale-graph and cross-run negative. Original audit anchor 2252-2261 sha256:56eac237f8938b9b36500fb9c726f6cd0f879ce2a3f189c833aed83968a15f3d.

Removed: legacy-import membership binding, forward-only repair and old-client/new-daemon mandates. Preserved: lifecycle and chair-lease CAS, crash atomicity, recovery custody, human/system disposition separation, typed cause, exact feature admission, typed rejection with zero mutation, gate/member/session atomic update and replay idempotence. Boundary expanded to complete sentences 2418-2440 from original audit anchor 2423-2436 sha256:d5d5942ccb8e3abdc1da235cbdee6bca2ca73a96856e5c16207fc3a9359eb3e2.

Removed: Migration 0013, upgrade, restart-repair and backfill chronology. Preserved: singleton indexes, exact chair/run admission, source-truth membership, one revision advance, immutable retirement proof, terminal/revocation/archive preconditions, child clearing, startup exclusion, all five negative fixtures and post-commit volatile cleanup. Inconsistent state now rejects without mutation. Boundary expanded through retirement paragraph 2459-2481 from original audit anchor 2459-2478 sha256:617c396239d6812d3320141f86152eb3c3c6b645afb7cd0de25e73c3dc80c2ba.

Removed: existing-row-gains and new-action additive schema wording. Preserved: every enumerated capability/configuration/compilation/run/authority/approval/task/workspace/worktree/temp/risk/adapter/host/profile/attestation/executable/policy/route/harness/context/permission/discovery column, the exact non-null versus nullable partition, every answer-bearing action and exact adapter/generation/digest foreign keys. Original audit anchor 11100-11127 sha256:191902e774b0b82ce9891518d5ad811ef1ea15e0b469dd87087225a9ac9b9233.
